primarySourceLabel: UW General Catalog Philosophy: Ethics requirements
sourceLabel: UW General Catalog Philosophy: Ethics requirements
requirementCueLines: Minimum 25 credits from approved list of ethics and justice-related courses. See department for approved course list.
One from PHIL 115, PHIL 120, or upper-division course in logic (5 credits)
One from PHIL 320, PHIL 330, PHIL 335, or PHIL 340. Adviser must approve substitutions (5 credits)
One from PHIL 322, PHIL 332, PHIL 342, or 400-level course in the same areas. Adviser must approve substitutions (5 credits)
Minimum four UW 400-level philosophy courses, excluding PHIL 484, two of which must be from approved list of ethics and justice-related courses (12-20 credits)
